title: tridophyllum bienne
intro: Tridophyllum bienne, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and sedative effects. The health benefits of Tridophyllum bienne include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and soothing digestive discomfort. Herbal preparations of Tridophyllum bienne typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its therapeutic properties.
